info.name: U.S. Energy Information Administration Open Data API

items.docs: Returns metadata for the top-level routes available in the API, including descriptions and child route identifiers.
Returns the available child routes under the electricity category, such as retail sales, generation, and balancing authority data.

info.name: Query electricity retail sales time series

params.name: frequency
params.description: Periodicity of returned data (annual, monthly, quarterly, daily).

params.name: data[]
params.description: Columns to include in the response (repeat for multiple columns).

params.name: start
params.description: Inclusive start of the date range (format depends on frequency, e.g. YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: end
params.description: Inclusive end of the date range (format depends on frequency, e.g. YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: offset
params.description: Pagination offset (zero-based row index).

params.name: length
params.description: Maximum number of rows to return (5,000 max for JSON, 300 max for XML).

params.name: out
params.description: Output format.

items.docs: Returns electricity retail sales time-series data filtered by state, sector, frequency, and date range.
Returns child routes for natural gas datasets.
